source: Curated Oregon sites + Oregon OEM shelters when published
disclaimer: Confirm with county OEM before you go. Open/closed status changes quickly during incidents.

properties.name: Deschutes County Fairgrounds & Expo Center
properties.petsNotes: Fairgrounds historically host large-animal evacuation support; confirm pet/livestock intake with Deschutes OEM.

properties.name: Jackson County Expo
properties.petsNotes: Expo grounds are often used for emergency animal staging; confirm with Jackson County Emergency Management.

properties.name: Crook County Fairgrounds
properties.petsNotes: Regional livestock-capable fairgrounds; confirm with county OEM before travel.

properties.name: Medford National Guard Armory (historical shelter site)
properties.petsNotes: People shelter only unless OEM announces otherwise; ask about pets before arriving.

properties.name: Temporary Evacuation Point
properties.petsNotes: Pet policy not specified — confirm with county OEM.

properties.name: Large Animal Shelter
properties.petsNotes: Listed as large-animal / livestock shelter by Oregon OEM.
